name: SFOTH RPG
description:
this has all the normal deities you would expect here, as well as the characters I headcanon would live here. each sfoth has a little area or place they live in, which is also where you can find each person :)

citizens: all seven sfoth, follower sword (Illumina), follower katana (Illumina), Egobworder (Ghostwalker), stargazer, (windforce) Astroken (Icedagger), normal sword (venomshank), witchlaser (Darkheart), dom, valk (both firebrand)
creator: JasonSydronem
